change.title: AI-assisted invoice approval and refund workflow
change.summary: A new AI agent reviews invoices, recommends refund approvals, and syncs payment state to the ERP. The release touches authentication, billing, webhook sync, and dashboard review screens.
change.diff_excerpt: Adds ai_agent_recommend_refund(), updates admin role checks, sends refund webhook events to ERP, and changes dashboard state from pending_review to auto_recommended. TODO: verify webhook replay handling and human approval requirement for high value refunds.
change.business_context: Finance wants to reduce manual refund review time without losing release control. The risky part is that an AI agent can recommend refunds and downstream systems update automatically unless a human approval gate catches high-risk cases.

risk_signals.impact: Payment regressions can create revenue loss, fraud, or customer trust issues.
Unauthorized access or privilege escalation can reach production users.
AI agent changes can create unsafe tool calls, prompt injection, or unreviewed decisions.
Integration failures can silently corrupt downstream workflows.
Quality signal that can increase regression coverage requirements.
Quality signal that can increase regression coverage requirements.

test_cases.title: Payment guardrail validation
preconditions: Test environment seeded with admin, standard user, and read-only user.
Release candidate build is deployed to staging.
UiPath robot has access only to test credentials and non-production data.
steps: Create a UiPath Test Cloud test set for this risk category.
Verify price, currency, tax, and discount values are not client-trustable.
Verify failed payment and retry states do not duplicate orders.
Verify refunds and cancellation paths require the correct actor.
Capture screenshots, logs, and API traces for evidence.
Route failed or ambiguous results to the release owner for approval.
test_cases.expected_result: All controls behave as expected, no unauthorized action succeeds, and any failure creates a human-review task before release.

test_cases.title: Authentication guardrail validation
preconditions: Test environment seeded with admin, standard user, and read-only user.
Release candidate build is deployed to staging.
UiPath robot has access only to test credentials and non-production data.
steps: Create a UiPath Test Cloud test set for this risk category.
Verify unauthenticated users cannot access protected actions.
Verify lower-privilege users cannot call admin or owner-only actions.
Verify session expiry and refresh behavior after identity changes.
Capture screenshots, logs, and API traces for evidence.
Route failed or ambiguous results to the release owner for approval.
test_cases.expected_result: All controls behave as expected, no unauthorized action succeeds, and any failure creates a human-review task before release.

Release candidate build is deployed to staging.
UiPath robot has access only to test credentials and non-production data.
steps: Create a UiPath Test Cloud test set for this risk category.
Verify prompt-injection content cannot trigger unauthorized tool use.
Verify the agent asks for human approval before irreversible actions.
Verify tool output is validated before being written to systems of record.
Capture screenshots, logs, and API traces for evidence.
Route failed or ambiguous results to the release owner for approval.
test_cases.expected_result: All controls behave as expected, no unauthorized action succeeds, and any failure creates a human-review task before release.
